The Neo-Indian is Caught in the Silken Net of Woven by Western Civilisation

# The Neo-Indian is Caught in the Silken Net of Woven by Western Civilisation

### World War I showed how the modern West was no different from the Huns and Vandals in committing untold savageries after looting colossal wealth across the globe.

THE HINDU COMMUNITY still produces men of the Sattvik type, though their number is much smaller than before. They rarely, if ever, appear in newspaper; what they do is done in silence and secrecy.
